title: post baselines create new baseline
description: Test the POST /baselines/ endpoint with a valid baseline payload containing name, path, and metadata. Verify that the response status is 200 and the response body contains the created Baseline object with an id.

title: post baselines missing required fields
description: Test the POST /baselines/ endpoint with a payload missing required fields such as name or path. Verify that the response status is 400 and the response contains validation error details.

title: get baselines list all baselines
description: Test the GET /baselines/ endpoint to retrieve all registered baselines. Verify that the response status is 200 and the response body contains a list of Baseline objects including any previously created baselines.

title: get baselines database unavailable
description: Simulate a database unavailability scenario and test the GET /baselines/ endpoint. Verify that the response status is 500 and the response contains an error payload indicating database access issues.

title: post baselines scan trigger background scan
description: Test the POST /baselines/{baseline_id}/scan endpoint with an existing baseline_id. Verify that the response status is 200 and the response body contains a task_id and a status indicating the scan is queued.

title: post baselines scan nonexistent baseline
description: Test the POST /baselines/{baseline_id}/scan endpoint with a non-existent baseline_id. Verify that the response status is 404 and the response contains an error message indicating baseline not found.

title: get scans list all scan results
description: Test the GET /scans/ endpoint to retrieve all integrity scan results. Verify that the response status is 200 and the response body contains a paginated list of ScanResult objects with their statuses.

title: get scans invalid query parameter
description: Test the GET /scans/ endpoint with an invalid query parameter such as invalid_param=xyz. Verify that the response status is 400 and the response contains a query parameter validation error.
